table.title: My team
table.userDeletionDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this user? He will no longer have access to your organisation's account, but will still have access to the studies for which he has been invited by other organisations.
table.necessaryAdmin: This administrator cannot be removed. He/she is the sole validator of the following studies:

role.ADMIN_description: An administrator has full rights to the organisation's account and to all studies for his organisation (whether public or private). It is impossible to change an administrator role on a study of his organisation.
role.COLLABORATOR_description: A collaborator is a person trained in the Bilan Carbone® method. They have no rights to the organisation's account but can create studies. They have access to their organisation's public studies with the role editor by default.
role.Not authorized: You are not allowed to do this action
role.More than one: There must be at least one admin or manager in the organisation
